Contact page UAT mismatch — UAT test #7 expects FAQ, page now has contact form; update UAT or revert

blockers.description: js/__env.js has empty Supabase credentials locally — Supabase features (best sellers, testimonials, newsletter) will show loading state or error state until credentials are added
blockers.workaround: Supabase client falls back to no-op stub; pages render without crash

human_actions_pending.action: Run UAT: open each page in browser and record results in 02-UAT.md
human_actions_pending.context: All 10 UAT tests are still [pending] — phase is not formally verified until UAT passes

human_actions_pending.action: Add real Supabase credentials to js/__env.js to test live data sections
human_actions_pending.context: Best Sellers, Testimonials, Newsletter sections need real credentials to test beyond the skeleton/error states

decisions.decision: Shifted all nav breakpoints from md: (768px) to lg: (1024px)
decisions.rationale: 5 nav links + action icons overflowed at 768px; 1024px gives sufficient room

decisions.decision: Contact page rewritten from FAQ accordion to contact form + info grid
decisions.rationale: elvora_updated-3.html reference shows contact form, not FAQ

decisions.decision: shop.html and style-match.html get branded 'coming soon' placeholders, not full implementation
decisions.rationale: Phase 3 (shop) and Phase 5 (style match) are out of scope for Phase 02

decisions.decision: Alpine.store() registered both in alpine:init and immediately at module load
decisions.rationale: Prevents TypeError when defer script (Alpine CDN) executes before type=module script (components.js)

decisions.decision: Supabase client exports no-op Proxy stub when credentials are empty
decisions.rationale: Prevents supabaseUrl is required crash during local dev and on pages that do not have credentials

next_action: Open browser, run UAT tests 1-10 from .planning/phases/02-brand-shell-homepage/02-UAT.md, record pass/fail results, then update STATE.md to phase complete.
context_notes: Phase 02 is code-complete. All 4 plans executed, all bug fixes from user review committed. The only remaining work is formal UAT and resolving the UAT/contact-page mismatch (test #7 expects FAQ, page now has a contact form).
